calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. There was no appearance, nor objection filed. Therefore, the court ordered the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Continued To May-05-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/05/2010 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
